content:
I see that the mdbook version which the Wasmtime book uses is outdated since November 2025, specifically the multilingual field is now removed.

Would it be OK for me to update the mdbook dependency to the latest version? Alternatively, I could also update the documentation with information on the mdbook and mdbook-langtabsdependencies and the used versions.
Hey @Friedrich Vandenberghe yes, please do! If you submit a PR we can review is reasonably quickly and do a spot check to ensure everything still generates fine -- thank you!
